definition: a microscope is a tool with a lens that makes very small things bigger so that we can see them with our eyes
example: The scientist studied a drop of water under the microscope.

definition: if you get rid of something, you throw it away or give it to someone because you no longer want it
example: Eitan wants to get rid of some old furniture in his house.

definition: a device is a piece of equipment, like a phone or TV, that is used for a specific purpose
example: The listening device was hidden inside a pen.

definition: a sculpture is a piece of art that has a 3D shape and is made of stone, metal, clay, or wood
example: Szymon’s sculpture of a horse won first prize in the competition.

definition: pleasure is a feeling of joy or happiness
example: It was a pleasure working with Aksel during the project.

definition: junk is broken, old, or damaged things you no longer want to keep
example: There was so much junk in the garage that we had to sort it and throw it away.

definition: if you upcycle something, you use it to create something new that is valuable to people
example: The curtains were upcycled into really nice clothes.

definition: treasure is an object or objects, like gold, that can be valuable
example: We’re going to look for hidden treasure on the beach.

definition: something that is hidden can’t be seen as it’s in a secret place
example: The necklace was hidden in a box under Elisavet’s bed.

definition: sneakers are shoes you wear to run or exercise in
example: Sichuang has a pair of sneakers she only wears when she goes running.

definition: a circuit board is a board that connects different electronic parts of a device safely
example: The circuit board in my cell phone got wet so my phone doesn’t work anymore.

definition: a microchip is a tiny plate that holds many electronic parts in a device and makes the device work
example: My laptop needs a new microchip to fix the screen.

definition: something that is effective achieves the results you want it to
example: Advertising on the radio is very effective for this product.

definition: if you refund somebody for something, you give them back the money they paid for it
example: The store refused to refund Máté for the pants that were torn.

definition: something that is frustrating makes you feel annoyed because it stops you from achieving your goals
example: It was frustrating to have to stand in the line for so many hours to collect my new passport.

definition: a replacement is something that takes the place of another thing, usually because the first one stopped working
example: The replacement tablet broke two weeks after it arrived.
